backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no methods defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features list, indicating no tracked features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files for the KopdeGoa website project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the KopdeGoa React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full KopdeGoa single-page website by rendering Header, Hero, About, Products, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying KopdeGoa's brand story paragraphs and a four-value card grid (Quality, Authenticity, Trust, Community) with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with phone, location, and hours info cards, social media links, and a validated request-changes form that opens a mailto link on submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the transparent logo, contact details, a smooth-scroll Request Changes link, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware background, transparent PNG logo, desktop nav links, and a collapsible mobile menu with smooth-scroll section navigation.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section for KopdeGoa with a background image, brand logo, tagline, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the products and contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Products section displaying a grid of liquor/wine category cards (Whisky, Wine, Vodka, etc.) with icons, descriptions, and a footer prompt to visit the store.
frontend/src/components/QrCodeSection.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty file; no data-fetching queries are needed since the backend has no methods and the site is static.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light/dark theme CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens) and utility classes for the accent-red color used throughout the app.
frontend/src/lib/qr.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration mapping oklch CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extending border radius and animations, and registering typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking a single pending feature request to preserve the KopdeGoa logo appearance unchanged across Header, Hero, and Footer components.
